title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO THOUSAND TWENTY-ONE RELATIVE TO THE SALARY OF THE LIEUTENANT-GOVERNOR OF THE SUBPROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MISAMIS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1870 / 57 OG No. 4, 627 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2749, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO THOUSAND TWENTY-ONE RELATIVE TO THE SALARY OF THE LIEUTENANT-GOVERNOR OF THE SUBPROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MISAMIS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section four of Republic Act Numbered Two thousand twenty-one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 4. The lieutenant-governor of the Subprovince of Camiguin shall receive a compensation of six thousand pesos

per annum

."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
